★ Lumber & Timber
Import Logistics

Our purpose-built lumber infrastructure handles every stage of the import journey — from vessel discharge at the port to indoor storage and final-mile flatbed delivery. We support hardwood, softwood, plywood, and engineered wood at scale across all major U.S. ports.

  • Break-bulk & neo-bulk vessel discharge
  • Dockside receiving & inventory control
  • Hardwood, softwood, plywood & engineered wood
  • Flatbed, step-deck & OTR final delivery
  • Proprietary WMS · EDI/API integration
  • Custom client reporting & visibility
▶ Primary Focus — World of Wood 2026
Metals & Pipe Transloading

Steel coil, pipe, billets & structural metals. Purpose-built facilities with high-capacity forklifts, booms & cranes. WMS tracks every bundle and heat number.

Port & Rail Drayage

Asset-based fleet: 400+ trucks & 1,100+ private chassis. Top-5 carrier at NY/NJ port. Full coverage across East & Gulf Coast with dedicated dispatch teams.

Warehousing & Yard Ops

2M+ sq ft across 7 port markets. Secure indoor/outdoor storage, 24/7 monitoring, cross-dock & transload. Built to minimize dwell time and D&D exposure.

Project & OOG Freight

Flat Rack & Open Top transloads for oversized/overweight cargo. Cranes, SPMTs & specialist rigging crews. Multi-phase project movements port to inland.

OTR Transportation

Dry Van, Flatbed, Step-Deck & OOG over-the-road. Heavy-duty chassis & flatbeds — owned & operated for seamless port-to-door service nationwide.

Dedicated & Contract Logistics

Custom peel-pile programs, off-site container stacking, inbound forecasting & D&D cost reduction. Tailored for large BCO accounts with high-volume recurring needs.

D&D Cost Management

Dedicated team monitoring every container for demurrage & detention exposure. Proactive alerting near LFD, yard analytics, and inbound forecasting to eliminate unnecessary fees.

Technology & Visibility

Proprietary WMS with EDI & API integration. Custom reporting, real-time inventory visibility, and data-driven insights — configurable to each client's operational needs.

Account Management

Dedicated account managers and dispatch personnel for every client. Consistent communication, operational transparency, and a long-term partnership approach to every account.
